metaDescription.en: Sven Shen - DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineer | 7+ years | Kubernetes | GitOps | Cloud Native

title.zh: 沈文强 | DevOps / SRE / 平台工程师
title.en: Sven Shen | DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineer

footerText.en: Looking forward to working with you

summary.zh: 7 年以上 DevOps、SRE 与平台工程相关经验。
summary.en: 7+ years of experience in DevOps, SRE, and platform engineering.

zh: 生产级 Kubernetes 与云原生平台
可观测性、故障响应与稳定性工程

status.zh: 正在找芜湖的工作机会
status.en: Looking for job opportunities in Wuhu

title.zh: 平台稳定性与 SRE 实践

description.zh: 具备生产级 Kubernetes 与云原生平台运维经验，长期围绕监控告警治理、故障响应、复盘改进、容量规划与成本优化推进稳定性建设。
description.en: Hands-on experience operating production Kubernetes and cloud-native platforms, with sustained work across alerting governance, incident response, post-incident improvement, capacity planning, and cost optimization.

title.zh: CI/CD 与 GitOps 标准化

description.zh: 长期使用 Terraform、Ansible、GitHub Actions、ArgoCD 与 FluxCD 建设自动化交付体系，推动基础设施代码化、应用声明式部署以及多环境发布流程标准化。
description.en: Built delivery automation with Terraform, Ansible, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and FluxCD, driving infrastructure-as-code, declarative application delivery, and standardized multi-environment release workflows.

description.zh: 覆盖 AWS、阿里云、腾讯云、华为云与 IDC 场景，具备资源治理、权限控制、环境初始化、网络与集群运维及跨项目支持经验。
description.en: Experienced across AWS, Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, Huawei Cloud, and IDC environments, with hands-on work in resource governance, access control, environment bootstrap, networking, cluster operations, and cross-project support.

title.zh: 可观测性、安全与工程治理

description.zh: 熟悉 Prometheus、Grafana、ELK、Zabbix、CloudWatch 等体系建设，也具备 RBAC、Secrets 管理、审计日志、运维审计与标准文档沉淀经验。
description.en: Built observability foundations with Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Zabbix, and CloudWatch, while also supporting RBAC, secrets management, audit logging, operations auditing, and standardized documentation.

title.zh: 容器化改造与平台迁移

description.zh: 参与传统应用向 Kubernetes 平台迁移与容器化改造，支持部署规范统一、滚动发布、自愈能力建设以及资源利用率优化。
description.en: Supported containerization and Kubernetes migration for existing applications, improving deployment standards, rolling release capability, self-healing behavior, and overall resource efficiency.

title.zh: 跨团队协作与交付推动

description.zh: 能够与研发、测试、产品、客户及跨部门团队协作推进方案评审、环境交付、问题排查与流程沉淀，提升项目落地效率与交付一致性。
description.en: Worked closely with engineering, QA, product, clients, and cross-functional teams to drive solution reviews, environment delivery, troubleshooting, and process standardization across projects.

description.zh: 负责多个客户项目的 DevOps 与生产环境运维工作，覆盖新项目交付、存量系统接手优化及日常稳定性保障。参与基础设施、CI/CD、GitOps、监控日志与发布流程方案设计，基于 Terraform、Ansible、GitHub Actions、ArgoCD / FluxCD 推动自动化交付落地，并参与故障响应、根因分析与 Runbook 沉淀。
description.en: Responsible for DevOps and production operations across multiple client projects, including greenfield delivery, inherited-system optimization, and ongoing reliability support. Worked on infrastructure, CI/CD, GitOps, observability, logging, and release design, using Terraform, Ansible, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and FluxCD to drive delivery automation, incident response, root cause analysis, and runbook improvements.

description.zh: 负责公司内部信息化系统的测试、生产环境建设与运维保障，覆盖 SpringCloud、MySQL、Redis、ELK 等核心组件。管理阿里云资源、Kubernetes 容器服务及 IDC 基础设施，参与监控告警、日志采集和自动化发布平台建设，并推动内部系统容器化改造。
description.en: Responsible for test and production environment setup and operations for internal information systems, covering SpringCloud, MySQL, Redis, and ELK. Managed Alibaba Cloud resources, Kubernetes container services, and IDC infrastructure, while contributing to monitoring, logging, automated release platforms, and containerization initiatives.

description.zh: 负责契约锁公有云平台的基础环境建设、发布体系维护、线上变更与日常运维保障，支撑平台从早期建设到稳定运行。参与私有化交付体系、工程协作工具链、安全加固、灾备与运维审计相关工作，并推动灰度发布与流程标准化落地。
description.en: Responsible for infrastructure setup, release maintenance, online changes, and daily operations for the Qiyuesuo public cloud platform, supporting its growth from early construction to stable operation. Contributed to privatized delivery, engineering tooling, security hardening, disaster recovery, operations auditing, and canary-release standardization.

value.zh: 目标工作地 · 安徽芜湖
